records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh come on, what a bore. They're just a bunch of grunts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh come on, what a bore. They're just a bunch of grunts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh come on, what a bore. They're just a bunch of grunts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be able to show off my new special move at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be able to show off my new special move at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be able to show off my new special move at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Show some grit, you stupid C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Show some grit, you stupid C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Show some grit, you stupid C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s are swarming her like crazy, but they're no match for her...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s are swarming her like crazy, but they're no match for her...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s are swarming her like crazy, but they're no match for her...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: With just one swing, the sea parts and the island's terrain is changing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: With just one swing, the sea parts and the island's terrain is changing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: With just one swing, the sea parts and the island's terrain is changing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when I'm this far away, I can still feel her power! Is this really all just from her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when I'm this far away, I can still feel her power! Is this really all just from her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when I'm this far away, I can still feel her power! Is this really all just from her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's like a breathing strategic weapon at this point...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's like a breathing strategic weapon at this point...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's like a breathing strategic weapon at this point...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be mistaken, rookie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be mistaken, rookie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be mistaken, rookie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not easy for any Counter to reach her level.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not easy for any Counter to reach her level.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not easy for any Counter to reach her level.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as you saw with your own eyes, it's not impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as you saw with your own eyes, it's not impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as you saw with your own eyes, it's not impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has gone beyond her limits with the sole intention of becoming stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has gone beyond her limits with the sole intention of becoming stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has gone beyond her limits with the sole intention of becoming stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,

records.m_Talk_ENG: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Lee Sooyeon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Lee Sooyeon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Lee Sooyeon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The CSE Level will soon reach 4 and a Category 4 C.O. might appear soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The CSE Level will soon reach 4 and a Category 4 C.O. might appear soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The CSE Level will soon reach 4 and a Category 4 C.O. might appear soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm! That's what I'm waiting for!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm! That's what I'm waiting for!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm! That's what I'm waiting for!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was getting worried that...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was getting worried that...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was getting worried that...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll all end without me being able to use my new special move...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll all end without me being able to use my new special move...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll all end without me being able to use my new special move...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Special move?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Special move?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Special move?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has an even more powerful attack that she hasn't used yet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has an even more powerful attack that she hasn't used yet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has an even more powerful attack that she hasn't used yet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That idiot, she's not going to use that, is she...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That idiot, she's not going to use that, is she...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That idiot, she's not going to use that, is she...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Lee Sooyeon! High-density Corruption ray detected ahead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Lee Sooyeon! High-density Corruption ray detected ahead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Lee Sooyeon! High-density Corruption ray detected ahead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Category 4 C.O. has emerged in the Normalside!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Category 4 C.O. has emerged in the Normalside!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Category 4 C.O. has emerged in the Normalside!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here I go! This is the special skill I perfected through intense training with Master!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here I go! This is the special skill I perfected through intense training with Master!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here I go! This is the special skill I perfected through intense training with Master!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Stop, Sooyeon! That move is not
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Stop, Sooyeon! That move is not
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Stop, Sooyeon! That move is not
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Speciallll! Skilllll!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Speciallll! Skilllll!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Speciallll! Skilllll!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Atomic Hilde PUNISHMEEEEEENT!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Atomic Hilde PUNISHMEEEEEENT!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Atomic Hilde PUNISHMEEEEEENT!

records.m_Talk_ENG: See that? You foolish Corrupted Object.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See that? You foolish Corrupted Object.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See that? You foolish Corrupted Object.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You just got whooped by the Grade S Counter of the Administration! The one and only, Lee Sooyeon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You just got whooped by the Grade S Counter of the Administration! The one and only, Lee Sooyeon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You just got whooped by the Grade S Counter of the Administration! The one and only, Lee Sooyeon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She really defeated a Category 4 C.O.... in one blow...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She really defeated a Category 4 C.O.... in one blow...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She really defeated a Category 4 C.O.... in one blow...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's incredible...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's incredible...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's incredible...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe! What do you think, Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe! What do you think, Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe! What do you think, Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I perfected a special skill that surpasses my limits again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I perfected a special skill that surpasses my limits again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I perfected a special skill that surpasses my limits again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I call it, <color=#ffd34c>Atomic Hilde Punishment</color>!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I call it, <color=#ffd34c>Atomic Hilde Punishment</color>!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I call it, <color=#ffd34c>Atomic Hilde Punishment</color>!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I named it out of respect for you, Master. I did a good job, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I named it out of respect for you, Master. I did a good job, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I named it out of respect for you, Master. I did a good job, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sooyeon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sooyeon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sooyeon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes? What's wrong, Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes? What's wrong, Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes? What's wrong, Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you going to compliment me on my new special skill
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you going to compliment me on my new special skill
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you going to compliment me on my new special skill
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't change that name immediately, I'm going to make you run 2094pkm in full Administration combat gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't change that name immediately, I'm going to make you run 2094pkm in full Administration combat gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't change that name immediately, I'm going to make you run 2094pkm in full Administration combat gear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: WHAAAT?! That's so mean! Master!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: WHAAAT?! That's so mean! Master!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: WHAAAT?! That's so mean! Master!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So, was your observation of our operation helpful, Ms. Braidwood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So, was your observation of our operation helpful, Ms. Braidwood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So, was your observation of our operation helpful, Ms. Braidwood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know if it was any help due to Sooyeon's fighting style being so simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know if it was any help due to Sooyeon's fighting style being so simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know if it was any help due to Sooyeon's fighting style being so simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you just say? You, Beanstalk!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you just say? You, Beanstalk!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you just say? You, Beanstalk!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I think I learned a lot today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I think I learned a lot today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I think I learned a lot today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I learned how powerful Counters can be and what I lack as one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I learned how powerful Counters can be and what I lack as one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I learned how powerful Counters can be and what I lack as one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, that's good news. I think your Deputy Commander will be pleased with it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, that's good news. I think your Deputy Commander will be pleased with it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that's good news. I think your Deputy Commander will be pleased with it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, tomboy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, tomboy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, tomboy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to you, I learned something important as a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to you, I learned something important as a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to you, I learned something important as a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Something important? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Something important? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Something important? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That for a Counter to become stronger, I must change my own consciousness and go beyond my limits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That for a Counter to become stronger, I must change my own consciousness and go beyond my limits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That for a Counter to become stronger, I must change my own consciousness and go beyond my limits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And lastly... spirit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And lastly... spirit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And lastly... spirit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also need to come up with cool skill names and shout them out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also need to come up with cool skill names and shout them out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also need to come up with cool skill names and shout them out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! It's amazing that you realized that all by yourself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! It's amazing that you realized that all by yourself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! It's amazing that you realized that all by yourself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You clearly know what's up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You clearly know what's up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You clearly know what's up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right! We should go back and practice together!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right! We should go back and practice together!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right! We should go back and practice together!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's one more idiot added to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's one more idiot added to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's one more idiot added to the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Speciallll! Skilllll!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Speciallll! Skilllll!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Speciallll! Skilllll!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-Alice EXPLOOOOOSION...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-Alice EXPLOOOOOSION...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-Alice EXPLOOOOOSION...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You gotta shout it out with more confidence!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You gotta shout it out with more confidence!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You gotta shout it out with more confidence!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lee Sooyeoooooonnnnn! STRIIIIIKE!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lee Sooyeoooooonnnnn! STRIIIIIKE!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lee Sooyeoooooonnnnn! STRIIIIIKE!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you think so...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you think so...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you think so...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I feel so embarrassed the more I do this... Are you sure about this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I feel so embarrassed the more I do this... Are you sure about this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I feel so embarrassed the more I do this... Are you sure about this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! How many times do I have to tell you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! How many times do I have to tell you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! How many times do I have to tell you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to become stronger, you can't have any doubts! You have to believe in yourself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to become stronger, you can't have any doubts! You have to believe in yourself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to become stronger, you can't have any doubts! You have to believe in yourself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay! I'll try again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay! I'll try again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay! I'll try again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, guess the saying is true. When you're stubborn, you always do things the hard way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, guess the saying is true. When you're stubborn, you always do things the hard way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, guess the saying is true. When you're stubborn, you always do things the hard way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't a shouting match. And what they're doing won't make their CRF any stronger either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't a shouting match. And what they're doing won't make their CRF any stronger either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't a shouting match. And what they're doing won't make their CRF any stronger either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But thanks to that, I got lots of humiliating recordings of the noob.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But thanks to that, I got lots of humiliating recordings of the noob.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But thanks to that, I got lots of humiliating recordings of the noob.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, but it's a good thing that she's doing her best for something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, but it's a good thing that she's doing her best for something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, but it's a good thing that she's doing her best for something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's leave her be for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. Plus, it's fun watching them.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe! What do you think, Master?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I perfected a special skill that surpasses my limits again!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I perfected a special skill that surpasses my limits again!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I perfected a special skill that surpasses my limits again!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I call it, <color=#ffd34c>Atomic Hilde Punishment</color>!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I call it, <color=#ffd34c>Atomic Hilde Punishment</color>!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I call it, <color=#ffd34c>Atomic Hilde Punishment</color>!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I named it out of respect for you, Master. I did a good job, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I named it out of respect for you, Master. I did a good job, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I named it out of respect for you, Master. I did a good job, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sooyeon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sooyeon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sooyeon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes? What's wrong, Master?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes? What's wrong, Master?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes? What's wrong, Master?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you going to compliment me on my new special skill
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you going to compliment me on my new special skill
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you going to compliment me on my new special skill
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't change that name immediately, I'm going to make you run 2094pkm in full Administration combat gear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't change that name immediately, I'm going to make you run 2094pkm in full Administration combat gear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't change that name immediately, I'm going to make you run 2094pkm in full Administration combat gear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: WHAAAT?! That's so mean! Master!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: WHAAAT?! That's so mean! Master!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: WHAAAT?! That's so mean! Master!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So, was your observation of our operation helpful, Ms. Braidwood?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So, was your observation of our operation helpful, Ms. Braidwood?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So, was your observation of our operation helpful, Ms. Braidwood?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know if it was any help due to Sooyeon's fighting style being so simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know if it was any help due to Sooyeon's fighting style being so simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know if it was any help due to Sooyeon's fighting style being so simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you just say? You, Beanstalk!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you just say? You, Beanstalk!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you just say? You, Beanstalk!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I think I learned a lot today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I think I learned a lot today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I think I learned a lot today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I learned how powerful Counters can be and what I lack as one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I learned how powerful Counters can be and what I lack as one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I learned how powerful Counters can be and what I lack as one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, that's good news. I think your Deputy Commander will be pleased with it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, that's good news. I think your Deputy Commander will be pleased with it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that's good news. I think your Deputy Commander will be pleased with it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, tomboy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, tomboy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, tomboy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to you, I learned something important as a Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to you, I learned something important as a Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to you, I learned something important as a Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Something important? What's that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Something important? What's that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Something important? What's that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That for a Counter to become stronger, I must change my own consciousness and go beyond my limits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That for a Counter to become stronger, I must change my own consciousness and go beyond my limits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That for a Counter to become stronger, I must change my own consciousness and go beyond my limits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And lastly... spirit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And lastly... spirit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And lastly... spirit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I also need to come up with cool skill names and shout them out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I also need to come up with cool skill names and shout them out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I also need to come up with cool skill names and shout them out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! It's amazing that you realized that all by yourself!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! It's amazing that you realized that all by yourself!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! It's amazing that you realized that all by yourself!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You clearly know what's up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You clearly know what's up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You clearly know what's up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right! We should go back and practice together!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right! We should go back and practice together!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right! We should go back and practice together!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's one more idiot added to the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's one more idiot added to the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's one more idiot added to the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Speciallll! Skilllll!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Speciallll! Skilllll!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Speciallll! Skilllll!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-Alice EXPLOOOOOSION...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-Alice EXPLOOOOOSION...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-Alice EXPLOOOOOSION...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You gotta shout it out with more confidence!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You gotta shout it out with more confidence!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You gotta shout it out with more confidence!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lee Sooyeoooooonnnnn! STRIIIIIKE!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lee Sooyeoooooonnnnn! STRIIIIIKE!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lee Sooyeoooooonnnnn! STRIIIIIKE!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you think so...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you think so...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you think so...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I feel so embarrassed the more I do this... Are you sure about this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I feel so embarrassed the more I do this... Are you sure about this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I feel so embarrassed the more I do this... Are you sure about this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! How many times do I have to tell you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! How many times do I have to tell you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! How many times do I have to tell you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to become stronger, you can't have any doubts! You have to believe in yourself!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to become stronger, you can't have any doubts! You have to believe in yourself!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to become stronger, you can't have any doubts! You have to believe in yourself!

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay! I'll try again!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay! I'll try again!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay! I'll try again!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, guess the saying is true. When you're stubborn, you always do things the hard way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, guess the saying is true. When you're stubborn, you always do things the hard way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, guess the saying is true. When you're stubborn, you always do things the hard way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't a shouting match. And what they're doing won't make their CRF any stronger either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't a shouting match. And what they're doing won't make their CRF any stronger either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't a shouting match. And what they're doing won't make their CRF any stronger either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But thanks to that, I got lots of humiliating recordings of the noob.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But thanks to that, I got lots of humiliating recordings of the noob.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But thanks to that, I got lots of humiliating recordings of the noob.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, but it's a good thing that she's doing her best for something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, but it's a good thing that she's doing her best for something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, but it's a good thing that she's doing her best for something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's leave her be for a while.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's leave her be for a while.
